interface.shortDescription: 123 production-ready skills for AI coding agents across 6 domains
interface.longDescription: The largest open-source skills library for AI coding agents. 123 skills covering engineering (architecture, DevOps, security, AI/ML), product management, regulatory compliance (ISO 13485, SOC 2, GDPR), project management, and business growth. Includes 123 stdlib-only Python CLI tools, 400+ reference guides, 25 orchestration agents, and 22 slash commands. Works with Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Aider, Windsurf, and 5 more tools.
